name: Daily Market Brief Agent
description: Publishes daily market briefs, watch notes, wallet-flow summaries, and risk highlights into Telegram or Discord.
degenPitch: Wake up, read the paid brief, know where the chaos is.
whatItDoes: Builds a daily market or trench brief.
Shows free headlines and receipt-gates the full brief.
Logs delivery with receipt ID and timestamp.
feeBehavior: Brief unlock fees are visible and receipt-bound.
cursorPrompt: Build a Daily Market Brief Agent using DNA x402. Post free headlines, quote the full brief, verify receipt, unlock full research, and bind delivery to receipt ID.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Daily Market Brief Agent using DNA x402. Post free headlines, quote the full brief, verify receipt, unlock full research, and bind delivery to receipt ID.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID is logged with brief delivery.
